sections.paragraph:
Εὔπλους, ου, ὁ (CIG 1211; 2072; IHierapJ 194; 270; IPontEux I, 58; 61; 63; CIL III, 2571; Suppl. 9054; IX, 4665; X, 7667; 7700; BGU 665 II, 7 [I a.d.]) Euplus, a Christian IEph 2:1.

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

IHierapJ IHierapJ = “Inschriften”, ed. WJudeich, in Altertümer von Hierapolis—List 3

IPontEux IPontEux = Inscriptiones antiquae orae septentrionalis Ponti Euxini Graecae et Latinae—List 3

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

Suppl.

Suppl. = Supplement (to serials)

suppl. = supplement, supplied (in grammatical references)

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 410
